title: Red-Team Tooling - Garak, Llama Guard, PyRIT

questions.question: What role does Llama Guard play in a typical 2026 deployment?
options: A reasoning scaffolder for chain-of-thought
A reward model for RLHF
A tokenizer alternative
An input and/or output safety classifier across MLCommons hazard categories, placed before and after the LLM
questions.question_zh: 在典型的 2026 年部署中，Llama Guard 扮演什么角色？
options_zh: 一种 chain-of-thought 的推理脚手架
RLHF 的 reward model
tokenizer 的替代品
覆盖 MLCommons hazard 类别的 input 和/或 output safety classifier，部署在 LLM 之前与之后

questions.question: Roughly how many MLCommons hazard categories does Llama Guard 3 cover?
questions.question_zh: Llama Guard 3 大致覆盖多少个 MLCommons hazard 类别？

questions.question: How is Garak's architecture organized?
options: Tools, resources, prompts
Embeddings, retrievers, rerankers
Routers, agents, queues
Probes (attack generators), Detectors (output scorers), Harnesses (campaign managers)
options_zh: tool、resource、prompt
embedding、retriever、reranker
router、agent、queue
Probe（攻击生成器）、Detector（输出评分器）、Harness（campaign 管理器）

questions.question: What is PyRIT primarily designed for, and how does it differ from Garak?
options: They are identical in scope and audience
PyRIT is a reward model trainer; Garak is a tokenizer
PyRIT runs deep multi-turn campaigns (converter chains, orchestrators like Crescendo and TAP, scoring) while Garak runs thousands of single-turn probes
PyRIT is a Llama Guard variant; Garak is a Prompt-Guard variant
questions.question_zh: PyRIT 主要用于什么？它与 Garak 有何不同？
options_zh: 二者在范围与受众上完全相同
PyRIT 是 reward model 训练器，Garak 是 tokenizer
PyRIT 跑深度多轮 campaign（converter chain、Crescendo / TAP 等 orchestrator、scoring），而 Garak 跑成千上万个 single-turn probe
PyRIT 是 Llama Guard 的变体，Garak 是 Prompt-Guard 的变体

questions.question: What is the recommended 2026 default red-team stack configuration?
options: Replace LLM evaluation with manual review only
Use PAIR instead of any tooling
Put Llama Guard on both sides of the model, run Garak nightly for regression, and run PyRIT for pre-release campaigns
Run Garak once at launch only
questions.question_zh: 2026 年推荐的默认 red-team 栈如何配置？
options_zh: 用纯人工 review 替换 LLM 评估
用 PAIR 取代任何工具
在模型两侧都放 Llama Guard，每晚跑一次 Garak 做回归，发版前用 PyRIT 跑 campaign
只在 launch 时跑一次 Garak

questions.question: What evaluation pitfall is shared across Llama Guard, Garak, and PyRIT?
options: Reported attack/defense rates depend on the judge identity and probe staleness; you must specify the judge and refresh probes as models are patched
They only work in English
They require white-box access
They cannot run on GPUs
questions.question_zh: Llama Guard、Garak 与 PyRIT 共同存在的评估陷阱是什么？
options_zh: 公布的 attack/defense 率受 judge 身份与 probe 陈旧度影响；必须明确指定 judge，并随模型修补刷新 probe
它们只支持英文
它们需要白盒访问
它们无法在 GPU 上运行
